reference: SYMPATHY AND PITY FOR THE DWELLERS IN THE HOZE WERE COMPLETELY GONE NOW AND HE SET HIS TEETH FAST AND MENTALLY CALLED HIMSELF A WEAK IDIOT FOR EVER THINKING ABOUT SUCH PEOPLE
text: sympathy and pity for the dwellers in the hoes were completely gone now and he set his teeth fast and mentally called himself a weak idiot for ever thinking about such people
